scope_declaration.out_of_scope: .pipeline/**, pipeline_contracts/**, pipeline_outputs/**, pipeline_state*.json, build_report.xml, qa_report.xml (step_plan 금지 목록)

changes_summary.change: MT-1~MT-4: Codex Review Gate 구현 — _validate_codex_review_schema, cmd_review codex 분기 확장, cmd_review_codex_record, _check_codex_review_gate absent=FAIL 전환, --codex-review-waiver 지원
MT-5: 28개 테스트 — TestSchemaValidator(6), TestReviewCodexStages(4), TestCodexRecord(5), TestGateCheck(5), TestRCARegressionPR60(4), TestSchemaEdgeCases(4). 28/28 PASS
MT-6: Trust chain에 Codex technical review(GPT-5.5) 삽입, Codex Review Gate 6-stage 섹션 신설
MT-6: Codex Review Gate 섹션 추가 (Dev/QA 진입 전 Codex ACCEPT 절차)
MT-6: Codex Review Gate 섹션 추가 (PM 책임, 6-stage 매핑, GPT-5.5 모델 고정, waiver 규칙)

impact_analysis.affected_function: pipeline._validate_codex_review_schema, pipeline.cmd_review (codex 분기), pipeline.cmd_review_codex_record, pipeline._check_codex_review_gate, pipeline.cmd_check (waiver 추가)
impact_analysis.change_description: pipeline.py에 Codex Review hard gate 전체 구현. 문서 3개에 Trust chain + gate 규칙 동기화.
